---
type: entity
created: 2026-06-15
updated: 2026-06-15
sources: ["[Statement-GDC-WSC_March-2024](../sources/Statement-GDC-WSC_March-2024.qmd)"]
tags: [event]
aliases:
  - "WSIS"
  - "World Summit on the Information Society"
---


# World Summit on the Information Society

## Basic Information
- Type: event
- Source: [Statement-GDC-WSC_March-2024.md](../brain/raw/Statement-GDC-WSC_March-2024.md.qmd)

## Description
The World Summit on the Information Society (WSIS) is a global UN-led initiative aimed at creating a common vision and understanding of the information society. The summit process serves as a fundamental framework for international cooperation, which the [global-digital-compact](../concepts/global-digital-compact.qmd) aims to build upon. The 'WSIS+20' review process acts as a critical milestone for assessing two decades of digital development. Furthermore, the role of international standards remains instrumental in achieving the long-term objectives set forth during these summits, as emphasized by stakeholders such as the [World Standards Cooperation](world-standards-cooperation.qmd).

## Related Entities
- [World Standards Cooperation](world-standards-cooperation.qmd)
- [global-digital-compact](../concepts/global-digital-compact.qmd)

## Related Concepts
- [Digital Cooperation](../concepts/digital-cooperation.qmd)

## Mentions in Source
- "The consultations also highlighted the continued importance of the outcomes of World Summit on the nformation Society (WSIS) and its implementation process." — [Statement-GDC-WSC_March-2024](../brain/raw/Statement-GDC-WSC_March-2024.qmd)
